languages.text: "Ваши слова были бы правдой, пускай и печальной, если бы я не был жив. Но ныне ваши притязания на мой флагман в лучшем случае сомнительны, не находите?"
"That would have been the truth — if a sad one — were I not alive. But as things stand, your claim to my flagship is dubious at best, don't you think?"
languages.original_text: "Ваши слова были бы правдой, пускай и печальной, если бы я не был жив. Но ныне ваши притязания на мой флагман в лучшем случае сомнительны, не находите?"

traits.locale_text: "That would have been the truth — if a sad one — were I not alive. But as things stand, your claim to my flagship is dubious at best, don't you think?"
"That would have been the truth — if a sad one — were I not alive. But as things stand, your claim to my flagship is dubious at best, don't you think?"
"That would have been the truth — if a sad one — were I not alive. But as things stand, your claim to my flagship is dubious at best, don't you think?"
"That would have been the truth — if a sad one — were I not alive. But as things stand, your claim to my flagship is dubious at best, don't you think?"
"That would have been the truth — if a sad one — were I not alive. But as things stand, your claim to my flagship is dubious at best, don't you think?"

languages.text: "Das wäre die traurige Wahrheit gewesen, wenn ich nicht lebte. Aber wie die Dinge stehen, ist Euer Anspruch auf mein Flaggschiff bestenfalls zweifelhaft, findet Ihr nicht?"
languages.original_text: "That would have been the truth — if a sad one — were I not alive. But as things stand, your claim to my flagship is dubious at best, don't you think?"

traits.locale_text: "Das wäre die traurige Wahrheit gewesen, wenn ich nicht lebte. Aber wie die Dinge stehen, ist Euer Anspruch auf mein Flaggschiff bestenfalls zweifelhaft, findet Ihr nicht?"

languages.text: « Vous auriez dit vrai, hélas, si je n'étais pas en vie. Mais dans l'état actuel des choses, comment pouvez-vous décemment prétendre être {mf|le|la} propriétaire de mon vaisseau amiral ? »
languages.original_text: "That would have been the truth — if a sad one — were I not alive. But as things stand, your claim to my flagship is dubious at best, don't you think?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous auriez dit vrai, hélas, si je n'étais pas en vie. Mais dans l'état actuel des choses, comment pouvez-vous décemment prétendre être {mf|le|la} propriétaire de mon vaisseau amiral ? »

languages.text: «Eso habría sido cierto, aunque lamentable, de no estar yo vivo. En la presente situación, su supuesta posesión de mi nave insignia es dudosa, como poco, ¿no le parece?».
languages.original_text: "That would have been the truth — if a sad one — were I not alive. But as things stand, your claim to my flagship is dubious at best, don't you think?"

traits.locale_text: «Eso habría sido cierto, aunque lamentable, de no estar yo vivo. En la presente situación, su supuesta posesión de mi nave insignia es dudosa, como poco, ¿no le parece?».

languages.text: "Hayatta olmasaydım... Bu dediğin acı da olsa gerçeği ifade ederdi. Ancak şu anda sancak gemim üzerindeki hak iddian, en hafif tabirle şüpheli. Sence de öyle değil mi?"
languages.original_text: "That would have been the truth — if a sad one — were I not alive. But as things stand, your claim to my flagship is dubious at best, don't you think?"

traits.locale_text: "Hayatta olmasaydım... Bu dediğin acı da olsa gerçeği ifade ederdi. Ancak şu anda sancak gemim üzerindeki hak iddian, en hafif tabirle şüpheli. Sence de öyle değil mi?"

languages.text: “如果我已不在人世，你这话倒是不假，虽然很可悲。但就目前来看，你说我这旗舰归你所有，怕是很难让人信服吧？”
languages.original_text: "That would have been the truth — if a sad one — were I not alive. But as things stand, your claim to my flagship is dubious at best, don't you think?"

traits.locale_text: “如果我已不在人世，你这话倒是不假，虽然很可悲。但就目前来看，你说我这旗舰归你所有，怕是很难让人信服吧？”

languages.text: 「もし私が生きていなかったならば、それは真実であったでしょう。悲しむべき真実ですが。しかし、現状では、あなたの旗艦に対する主張は、少なくとも疑わしいと思いますよ。」
languages.original_text: "That would have been the truth — if a sad one — were I not alive. But as things stand, your claim to my flagship is dubious at best, don't you think?"

traits.locale_text: 「もし私が生きていなかったならば、それは真実であったでしょう。悲しむべき真実ですが。しかし、現状では、あなたの旗艦に対する主張は、少なくとも疑わしいと思いますよ。」
